title: Peaceful Crafting
description: Mob drops unobtainable in Peaceful made craftable
body:
This datapack simply adds crafting recipes for items that would be normally impossible or very hard to obtain in Peaceful Mode.

Adds recipes for:
- Rotten flesh
- Spider Eye
- Slime ball
- Bone
- String
- Gunpowder
- Blaze powder
- Blaze rod
- Ghast tear
- Nether star
- Skeleton skull
- Wither skeleton skull
- Zombie head
- Creeper head
- Piglin head
